ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fabrics" (
  "fabric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fabric type */,
  "fabric_name" TEXT /* Name of the fabric type */,
  "width" TEXT /* Width of the fabric in cm */,
  "ink" TEXT /* Type of ink used */,
  "weave" TEXT /* Weave pattern of the fabric */,
  "composition" TEXT /* Composition of the fabric (e.g., 100% Cotton) */,
  "processing_time" TEXT /* Processing time for the fabric */,
  "properties" TEXT /* Properties of the fabric (e.g., Child Safe, Organic) */,
  "print_quality" TEXT /* Print quality of the fabric (e.g., starstarstarstarstar) */,
  "price_per_meter" REAL /* Price per meter of the fabric */,
  "fabric_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fabric type category */,
  "fabric_category" TEXT /* Broader category of the fabric (e.g., natural, synthetic) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the fabric */,
  "pattern" TEXT /* Pattern of the fabric */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Indicates if the fabric is currently available */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the fabric image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fabric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fabrics_fabric_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fabric_type_id") REFERENCES fabric_types ("fabric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "fabric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fabric type ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of fabric ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "order_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or instructions for the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Applicable discount for the order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_fabric_id FOREIGN KEY ("fabric_id") REFERENCES fabrics ("fabric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "fabric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fabric type */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Current quantity of fabric in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the fabric */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last stock update */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "location" TEXT /* Storage location of the fabric */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date if out of stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_fabric_id FOREIGN KEY ("fabric_id") REFERENCES fabrics ("fabric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales, inventory manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fabric_types" (
  "fabric_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fabric type */,
  "fabric_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the fabric type */,
  "fabric_category" TEXT /* Broader category of the fabric (e.g., natural, synthetic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fabric_type_id")
)
